feeSchedule.source: Kalshi published general trading fee schedule (transcribed, NOT read from the API)
feeSchedule.note: quadratic in price: maximal near $0.50, minimal at the wings

caps.rationale: initial safety caps, deliberately conservative; never widen them on a winning streak

decisions.contractWording: Will Anna Melisano win the Melisano vs Barbosa professional MMA fight scheduled for Jul 18, 2026?
decisions.settlementRules: If Anna Melisano wins the Melisano vs Barbosa professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Jul 18, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
decisions.probabilityModelStatus: outright winner — priced from the fighter win probability

flatStakeComparison.note: flat 0.5% stake for audit: if Kelly and flat diverge sharply, Kelly is reacting to a probability the system has not earned

decisions.reason: conservative EV/$ 0.3079; uncertainty x0.83; liquidity x1.00; clarity x1; coverage x0.4; price room 5.5c
decisions.mainUncertainty: stated range 23.5-33.5% for Anna Melisano; evidence INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE; baseline is an opening line (LOGICAL_OPEN): the market has since moved and that move is not in this number

unverifiedEstimatedEdge.label: UNVERIFIED ESTIMATED EDGE
unverifiedEstimatedEdge.caveat: This system has never demonstrated predictive skill. The only evaluation that showed one is void (BASELINE CONTAMINATED). This is a difference between two numbers, not a proven advantage.

portfolioExposure.note: Fights on one card are assumed independent for exposure totals. That is an ASSUMPTION: a common cause (a card-wide judging tendency, an altitude effect) would correlate them and is not modelled.
